title: Epic Stats Remastered: Weapon Requirements
description: An addon for ESR that adds extra features
body:
![aa]![grgr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/940ddcfbfb67247af5e62c25e50b580cf6bddef8_0.webp)
# Epic Stats Remastered: Weapon Requirements

### An addon mod for ESR to add extra features as:

- Adds weight to weapons and tools
- Adds stat level requirements per item
 

Adds a very easy config for edit and adding new ones. There's a few of custom slots opened for now, there will be more between updates.

 

## This mod requires [ESR](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-stats) to work and also [Epic Fight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-mod) if you are using weight system

This is a public beta, report any bug in my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/WCvtnkQ4)

If you want to support my work there's my [Patreon Page](https://www.patreon.com/FelinaMods)
